questions.question: What country is second to the U.S. in the number of pro athletes it has produced?

What war saw U.S. planes drop a record seven million tons of bombs?
What was heralded in a 1944 Life ad: 'From Ordinary Mold! The Greatest Healing Agent of This War'?
What popular NHL team's emblem depicts a goalie mask with a bill?
Whose full name was Chernobyl, according to some high schoolers in a 1990s survey?
